remember: Students will be able to recall and list the main factors that determine income and employment in an economy.
Students will be able to identify and explain the different types of employment.
Students will be able to recall and explain the concept of income and employment multiplier.
understand: Students will be able to understand the relationship between income and employment in an economy.
Students will be able to explain how changes in government expenditure affect income and employment.
Students will be able to explain how changes in taxes affect income and employment.
apply: Students will be able to apply the concepts of income and employment to real-world scenarios.
Students will be able to calculate the income and employment multiplier in a given scenario.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of government policies on income and employment.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the data and statistics related to income and employment in an economy.
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of different policies in achieving full employment.
Students will be able to compare and contrast the different types of employment and their characteristics.

ncert_objectives: To explain the concept of income and employment and their relationship in a closed economy.
To discuss the factors that determine income and employment in a closed economy.
To explain the concept of income and employment multiplier and its significance in a closed economy.
board_exam_objectives: To explain the concept of income and employment in a closed economy.
To discuss the factors that determine income and employment in an economy.
To calculate the income and employment multiplier in a given scenario and explain its significance.
